ksa_text: Operate the Data Governance Council, including scheduling, agenda preparation, issue tracking, decision logging, and follow-through on action items.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.

nice.top_element_label: Develop data standards, policies, and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.
Develop data standards, policies, and procedures

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.431) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Platform. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Platform roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Governance is not a standard competency expectation for VP Data Platform. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Data Platform competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.431) and edge-domain placement (Data Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Data Platform. All passes support exclusion.
